title: Luffy Lands in Wano and Meets Tama
description: On pages 14–18, this part focuses on Unknown person #12, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15 as Luffy lands in Wano, meets Tama, and immediately collides with the poverty and cruelty of Kaido’s rule.
scene: Luffy washes up in Wano, meets Tama, and discovers a country suffering under Kaido’s rule.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Actually, why don't you make me a dish, Mr. Waiter?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's make a deal. If my fare manages to satisfy you,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You'll finish not only it, but the rest of the food on that table.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: move, Patty! Make some space for me on the counters and the stove!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why in the hell do I have to be ordered around by you, ya octopus?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And who said yer gonna be the one makin' her dish, Sanji?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Shut up and get to it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Tehe... Mr. Waiter seems a bit too big for his britches. "I almost feel bad for him.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, yeah. The stuff we caught last week. It should be cleaned and ready, right? Bring it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Who-?! that stuff?! are you seri- outs?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Shallots, Ciseler! Cham- Pignon, cartie Cisle!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shallots and aromatics, faire reduce in white wine and fumet de poison!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lightly saute the shelled meat in butter! And then, with /:(cognac...

summary: This section advances the Wano Country Arrival storyline with 18 dialogue beats. Luffy’s first steps in Wano establish Tama’s kindness, the country’s hunger, and the brutality of Kaido’s forces.
